safety.disclaimer: This is a research prototype. Not medical advice. Discuss all decisions with your healthcare team.

logbook.aiInput: Describe your entry... (e.g. 'Lunch: Pasta, 60g carbs, 5 IE NovoRapid, BG 142')

logbook.aiAnalyzeFailed: Analysis failed. Please try again or enter it manually.
logbook.insulinNote: Insulin data is only documented, not evaluated.
logbook.insulinNoteLong: Insulin data is only documented, not evaluated or used for treatment.

history.refreshFailed: Could not refresh the summary. Try again.

stats.signInHint: Sign in to see your Buddy stats.

mood.empty: Start a conversation to track how your chats feel over time.

summaryView.summaryUnavailable: No reflection is available for this conversation yet.

buddy.title: Diabetes Buddy
buddy.intro: I'm your Diabetes Buddy. Here you can openly talk about your everyday life with diabetes – about frustrations, achievements, and everything that's on your mind. I'm not a therapist and not a doctor. My answers may contain errors.
buddy.suggestion1: I want to share a success
buddy.suggestion2: I feel overwhelmed by life with diabetes
buddy.defaultResponse: That's an interesting question. As a research prototype, I can't generate real AI answers yet, but in the finished version I would give you a helpful answer here. Is there anything else you'd like to discuss?
buddy.emotionalResponse: I hear that this is weighing on you. It's completely understandable to sometimes feel overwhelmed. Would you like to talk about what helps you in such moments?
buddy.dataResponse: It sounds like you mentioned data that I could suggest as a logbook entry. This feature is coming in a later version!
buddy.historyLoadFailed: Conversation history could not be loaded.

insights.title: Insights
insights.subtitle: Patterns and trends from your data
insights.discussWithTeam: Discuss patterns with your healthcare team.
insights.motivationQuote: Every day with diabetes is a day where you care for yourself. You deserve recognition.
insights.goal1Title: This week, pay attention to how you feel after meals
insights.goal1Description: Quickly note how you feel right after eating.
insights.goal2Title: Every evening, write a short reflection entry
insights.goal2Description: Write 1–2 sentences: what went well and what's on your mind.
insights.insufficientData: Collect more data to receive personalized insights. Have a few conversations with your Diabetes Buddy and track your values.

import.title: Import Data
import.subtitle: Import data from external sources
import.info: You can import CSV files from various sources. Supported formats: mySugr, LibreLink Export.
import.prototypeNote: This import is a prototype. Complex files may not be processed correctly.
import.dropzone: Drag CSV file here or click to select
import.noColumnsParsed: Could not read the first row as a table header. Please use a CSV file with a header row.
import.notAvailableDesc: Importing into the database is not implemented in this version. Add entries in the logbook or use the AI quick input.

auth.consentText:
Welcome to GlucoCompanion!

This app is a research prototype for a bachelor's thesis. Before you can use the app, I would like to inform you about data processing.

What is stored:
• Your chosen pseudonym and PIN (not your real name)
• Logbook entries (blood glucose, insulin, meals, activity, mood)
• Conversations with the Diabetes Buddy
• Detected patterns and goals

Where data is stored:
• Database server in the EU (Supabase, Frankfurt)
• For AI processing, messages are sent to OpenAI (USA). EU standard contractual clauses apply. Data is not used by OpenAI for model training.

Important notes:
• The app is NOT a medical product and does not replace medical advice.
• AI responses may contain errors.
• Participation is voluntary. You can stop at any time.
• Your data will be deleted after the study is completed.
• Please do NOT enter real names, addresses, or other identifying information in the app.

Contact: tanja.settele@gmail.com
auth.consentCheckbox: I have read the privacy information and agree to data processing as part of this study.
auth.pseudonymHelper: Choose a made-up name (not your real name). Examples: SunnyDay42, BlueStar, Cookie2026
auth.pseudonymInvalid: Pseudonym may only contain letters and numbers
auth.pseudonymTaken: This pseudonym is already taken. Please choose another one.
auth.pinHelper: Your PIN protects your data. Remember it well!
auth.loginSubtitle: Sign in with your pseudonym and PIN
auth.deleteAccountConfirmText: Do you really want to permanently delete all your data? This action cannot be undone.
